title: plesioneuron altum
intro: Plesioneuron altum, also known as the "Mountain Fern" or "Plesioneuron," is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Plesioneuron altum include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
